message:
fix: Resolve build and test failures across workspace

- Add serde_json dev-dependency for integration tests (Cargo.toml)
- Fix clap version string type with Box::leak (src/main.rs)
- Remove short option conflict: -c collector vs -c config (vc_cli)
- Add .to_string() for mock return_const calls (vc_alert)
- Remove unused Duration import (vc_collect/collectors/mod.rs)
- Fix sysmoni test to handle both present/absent tool cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -113,5 +113,8 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 anyhow.workspace = true
 
+[dev-dependencies]
+serde_json.workspace = true
+
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen-gix = { version = "9.1.0", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
